classObjective: Use the Midpoint Formula to find the coordinates of the midpoint of a segment in the coordinate plane.
workedExamples: 10-7, Example 1 — Find the Midpoint on a Number Line
10-7, Example 3 — Find the Midpoint in the Coordinate Plane
warmUp: What is the midpoint of (4, 8) and (6, 10)?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: Midpoint Formula ((x1+x2)/2, (y1+y2)/2); number line midpoint; real-world midpoint reasoning
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice using the Midpoint Formula in various contexts
independentPractice: Practice problems finding midpoints on number lines and coordinate planes
assessment: Exit ticket: find the midpoint of (-5, 2) and (3, -4)
capReflection: How does the Midpoint Formula relate to averaging coordinates?
